    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    C

    checkBothReady() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
    Checks if both players are ready and starts the game if they are.
    checkBothReady() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager
    Checks if both players are ready and starts the game if so.
    checkRemoving(int[][]) - Static method in class com.comp2042.util.MatrixOperations
     
    clear() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.GarbageQueue
    Clears all pending garbage.
    clearAllPanels() - Method in class com.comp2042.view.SinglePlayerScreen
    Clears all panels (display matrix, hold brick, next bricks) using the renderer.
    clearBrickPanels(MultiplayerScreen) - Method in class com.comp2042.view.GameViewRenderer
    Clears all brick panels for multiplayer (brick panels, ghost panels, hold panels, next panels).
    clearDisplayMatrix(Rectangle[][]) - Method in class com.comp2042.view.GameViewRenderer
    Clears the display matrix by setting all cells to transparent.
    clearMultiplayerGamePanels() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager
    Clears all multiplayer game panels (game panels, brick panels, ghost panels) and side panels (hold, next, score, level) by setting all rectangles to transparent/empty state and resetting labels to default values.
    clearMultiplayerReferences() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameStateManager
    Clears multiplayer references (controllers, listeners, timelines).
    clearNextBrickPanes(List, int) - Method in class com.comp2042.view.GameViewRenderer
    Clears and re-initializes next brick panes with transparent rectangles.

    CountdownManager - Class in com.comp2042.controller.manager
    Manages the countdown sequence before starting a game.
    CountdownManager(AudioManager, PanelCoordinator, GameLoopManager) - Constructor for class com.comp2042.controller.manager.CountdownManager
     
    counterGarbage(int) - Method in class com.comp2042.model.SimpleBoard
    Counters incoming garbage by removing lines from THIS player's queue when THIS player clears lines.
    createCountdownTimeline() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager
    Creates and starts the countdown timeline.
    createGameController(int) - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager.GameControllerFactory
     
    createMultiplayerTimeline(int) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager
    Creates and starts the multiplayer game loop timeline for a specific player.

    createNewBrick() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.SimpleBoard

    createSinglePlayerTimeline() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager
    Creates and starts the single player game loop timeline.
